name: Scanner
summary: List scanners and run document scans through URI routes.
description: Scanner is an if-uri urirun connector for list scanners and run document scans through URI routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Scanner capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use scanner:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
